beforeUpdateSql.sql:
-----------------------------------Date Checking------------------------------------------------------------------

if @date_from > @date_to
begin
	raiserror('Date From cannot be greater than Date To',16,1)
end

config.value:
-----------------------------------Date Checking------------------------------------------------------------------

if @date_from > @date_to
begin
	raiserror('Date From cannot be greater than Date To',16,1)
end

-----------------------------------Checking gap between last entered financial year and newly creating financial year----------------------------------------------------------
declare @count int
set @count = (select count(id) from financial_year_profile)
SELECT @count

if @count > 0 
	BEGIN
		declare @last_end_date date
		declare @next_expected_date_from date

		set @last_end_date = (select top 1 date_to from financial_year_profile order by date_to desc)
		set @next_expected_date_from = DATEADD(DAY, 1, @last_end_date)

		if @date_from != @next_expected_date_from
			begin
				raiserror('Please Check The Date From You Given', 16, 1)
			end
	END
	
	
-----------------------------------Date Checking------------------------------------------------------------------

if @date_from > @date_to
begin
	raiserror('Date From cannot be greater than Date To',16,1)
end

beforeInsertSql.sql:
-----------------------------------Checking gap between last entered financial year and newly creating financial year----------------------------------------------------------
declare @count int
set @count = (select count(id) from financial_year_profile)
SELECT @count

if @count > 0 
	BEGIN
		declare @last_end_date date
		declare @next_expected_date_from date

		set @last_end_date = (select top 1 date_to from financial_year_profile order by date_to desc)
		set @next_expected_date_from = DATEADD(DAY, 1, @last_end_date)

		if @date_from != @next_expected_date_from
			begin
				raiserror('Please Check The Date From You Given', 16, 1)
			end
	END
	
	
-----------------------------------Date Checking------------------------------------------------------------------

if @date_from > @date_to
begin
	raiserror('Date From cannot be greater than Date To',16,1)
end

afterInsertSql.sql:
Declare @p_id int
Declare productList Cursor
	For 
	select id from leave_types

Open productList

Fetch Next From productList Into @p_id

While @@FETCH_STATUS=0
	Begin 
		declare @carryOver bit
		declare @noOfLeaves decimal(12,4)

		set @carryOver = (select carry_over from leave_types where id = @p_id)
		set @noOfLeaves = (select no_of_leaves_in_an_year from leave_types where id = @p_id)

		if @carryOver = 1
			begin
				update 
					available_leaves
				set	
					available_leaves = available_leaves + @noOfLeaves
				where
					leave_type_id = @p_id
			end
		else
			begin
				update
					available_leaves
				set
					available_leaves = @noOfLeaves
				where 
					leave_type_id = @p_id
			end
		
		Fetch Next From productList Into @p_id
	End
	
	
Close productList
Deallocate productList

select
	distinct el.morning_attendance as value,
	case		
		when el.morning_attendance = 0 then 'Absent'
		when el.morning_attendance = 1 then 'Present'	
	end as text
from
	employee_ledger el

sqlQuery.sql:
-------------------------------------Attendance insert into Employee Ledger query of Present People---------------------------------------------

 declare @current_date date

 set @current_date = GETDATE()

--------------------------------HOLIDAY CHECKING-----------------------------------------------------------------------

 if @current_date in (select leave_date from company_leaves)
	BEGIN
			insert into employee_ledger ( _creation_date, _creation_time, employee_profile_id, attendance_date, morning_attendance, afternoon_attendance) 
			select  GETDATE(), GETDATE(), id, @current_date, 'Holiday', 'Holiday' from employee_profile where status = 'active'
	END

else
	BEGIN


		Declare @p_id int
		Declare productList Cursor
			For 
			select id from employee_profile where status = 'active'

		Open productList

		Fetch Next From productList Into @p_id


		While @@FETCH_STATUS=0
			Begin 
	
			 declare @count int
	 
			 set @count = (select count(id) from employee_ledger where employee_profile_id = @p_id and attendance_date = @current_date)

			 if @count = 0
				begin
					insert into employee_ledger ( _creation_date, _creation_time, employee_profile_id, attendance_date, morning_attendance, afternoon_attendance) 
					select  GETDATE(), GETDATE(), id, GETDATE(), 'Present', 'Present' from employee_profile where status = 'active' and id = @p_id
				end

				Fetch Next From productList Into @p_id
			End
	
	
		Close productList
		Deallocate productList


	END

else

				end

				Fetch Next From productList Into @p_id
			End
	
	
		Close productList
		Deallocate productList


	END

afterExecSqlSql.sql:
declare @count_leave_days int
declare @start_date date
declare @end_date date
declare @day_type varchar(255)
declare @employee_profile_id int
declare @leave_type_id int
declare @status varchar(255)


set @employee_profile_id = (select employee_profile_id  from leave_requests where id = @selectedRowId)
set @leave_type_id = (select leave_type_id  from leave_requests where id = @selectedRowId)
set @status = (select status  from leave_requests where id = @selectedRowId)
set @start_date = (select top 1 leave_day  from employee_leave_days where leave_request_id = @selectedRowId order by id asc)
set @end_date  = (select top 1 leave_day  from employee_leave_days where leave_request_id = @selectedRowId order by id desc)
set @day_type = (select day_type  from leave_requests where id = @selectedRowId)
set @count_leave_days = (select count(id) from employee_leave_days where leave_request_id = @selectedRowId)

--select @leaveDays


if DATEDIFF(DAY, @start_date, @end_date) = 0 and @day_type = 'half_day'
	begin
		update
			available_leaves
		set
			available_leaves = available_leaves - .5
		where 
			employee_profile_id = @employee_profile_id
		and 
			leave_type_id = @leave_type_id
		and 
			@status = 'approved'
	end
else
	begin
		update
			available_leaves
		set 
			available_leaves = available_leaves - CAST(@count_leave_days as decimal(12,4))
		where 
			employee_profile_id = @employee_profile_id
		and 
			leave_type_id = @leave_type_id
		and 
			@status = 'approved'
	end
-----------------------------------------------Insert Approved leaves to Employee Ledger------------------------------------------------------------------------



declare @timing varchar(255)

set @timing = (select timing from leave_requests where id = @selectedRowId)



Declare @p_id int
Declare productList Cursor
	For 
	select id from employee_leave_days where leave_request_id = @selectedRowId

Open productList

Fetch Next From productList Into @p_id

While @@FETCH_STATUS=0
	Begin 
	    
declare @leave_day date
declare @employee int
declare @count int

set @leave_day = (select leave_day from employee_leave_days where id = @p_id)
set @employee = (select employee_profile_id from employee_leave_days where id = @p_id)
set @count = (select count(id) from employee_ledger where attendance_date = @leave_day and employee_profile_id = @employee)
	
	if @count = 0
		BEGIN
			if @day_type = 'full_day'
				begin
					insert into employee_ledger ( _creation_date, _creation_time, employee_profile_id, attendance_date, morning_attendance, afternoon_attendance)
					select GETDATE(), GETDATE(), employee_profile_id, @leave_day, 'Absent', 'Absent' from employee_leave_days where id = @p_id
				end

			if @day_type = 'half_day' and @timing = 'am'
				begin
					insert into employee_ledger ( _creation_date, _creation_time, employee_profile_id, attendance_date, morning_attendance, afternoon_attendance)
					select GETDATE(), GETDATE(), employee_profile_id, @leave_day, 'Absent', 'Present' from employee_leave_days where id = @p_id
				end

			if @day_type = 'half_day' and @timing = 'pm'
				begin
					insert into employee_ledger ( _creation_date, _creation_time, employee_profile_id, attendance_date, morning_attendance, afternoon_attendance)
					select GETDATE(), GETDATE(), employee_profile_id, @leave_day, 'Present', 'Absent' from employee_leave_days where id = @p_id
				end
		END
	else
		BEGIN
			if @day_type = 'full_day'
				begin
					update
						employee_ledger
					set
						morning_attendance = 'Absent', afternoon_attendance = 'Absent'
					where
						attendance_date = @leave_day and employee_profile_id = @employee
				end

			if @day_type = 'half_day' and @timing = 'am'
				begin
					update
						employee_ledger
					set
						morning_attendance = 'Absent', afternoon_attendance = 'Present' 
					where
						attendance_date = @leave_day and employee_profile_id = @employee
				end

			if @day_type = 'half_day' and @timing = 'pm'
				begin
					update
						employee_ledger
					set
						morning_attendance = 'Present' , afternoon_attendance = 'Absent' 
					where
						attendance_date = @leave_day and employee_profile_id = @employee
				end
		END
		
		Fetch Next From productList Into @p_id
	End
	
	
Close productList
Deallocate productList

set @timing = (select timing from leave_requests where id = @selectedRowId)

set @employee = (select employee_profile_id from employee_leave_days where id = @p_id)

	if @count = 0

				end

			if @day_type = 'half_day' and @timing = 'am'

					select GETDATE(), GETDATE(), employee_profile_id, @leave_day, 'Absent', 'Present' from employee_leave_days where id = @p_id
				end

			if @day_type = 'half_day' and @timing = 'pm'
				begin
					insert into employee_ledger ( _creation_date, _creation_time, employee_profile_id, attendance_date, morning_attendance, afternoon_attendance)
					select GETDATE(), GETDATE(), employee_profile_id, @leave_day, 'Present', 'Absent' from employee_leave_days where id = @p_id
				end
		END
	else
		BEGIN
			if @day_type = 'full_day'
				begin
					update
						employee_ledger
					set
						morning_attendance = 'Absent', afternoon_attendance = 'Absent'
					where
						attendance_date = @leave_day and employee_profile_id = @employee
				end

			if @day_type = 'half_day' and @timing = 'am'

					update
						employee_ledger
					set
						morning_attendance = 'Absent', afternoon_attendance = 'Present' 
					where
						attendance_date = @leave_day and employee_profile_id = @employee
				end

			if @day_type = 'half_day' and @timing = 'pm'
				begin
					update
						employee_ledger
					set
						morning_attendance = 'Present' , afternoon_attendance = 'Absent' 
					where
						attendance_date = @leave_day and employee_profile_id = @employee
				end
		END
		
		Fetch Next From productList Into @p_id
	End
	
	
Close productList
Deallocate productList

beforeInsertSql.sql:
-----------------------------------Date Checking------------------------------------------------------------------

if @start_date > @end_date
begin
	raiserror('Start Date cannot be greater than End Date',16,1)
end

----------------------------------leave availablility checking-----------------------------------------------------

if @available_leaves_id = 0
begin
	raiserror('Sorry, No Leave Left In This Year', 16, 1)
end

----------------------------------Leave Duplication Checking------------------------------------------------------

Declare @p_id int
Declare productList Cursor
	For 
	select id from employee_leave_days where employee_profile_id = @employee_profile_id

Open productList

Fetch Next From productList Into @p_id


While @@FETCH_STATUS=0
	Begin 
	 
	 declare @leave_day date
	 set @leave_day = (select leave_day from employee_leave_days where id = @p_id)
	 
	 if @leave_day between @start_date and @end_date
		begin
			raiserror('Already Leave Requested Days Are Included. Please Check The Leave Dates', 16, 1)
			
			break;
		end
		
		
		Fetch Next From productList Into @p_id
	End
	
	
Close productList
Deallocate productList

-----------------------------------Date Checking------------------------------------------------------------------

if @start_date > @end_date
begin
	raiserror('Start Date cannot be greater than End Date',16,1)
end

	raiserror('Sorry, No Leave Left In This Year', 16, 1)
end

			break;
		end
		
		
		Fetch Next From productList Into @p_id
	End
	
	
Close productList
Deallocate productList

afterInsertSql.sql:
declare @leave_date date

set @leave_date = @start_date



while (@leave_date between @start_date and @end_date)
begin
	if @leave_date not in (select leave_date from company_leaves)
		begin
			insert into employee_leave_days (_creator, _creation_date, _creation_time, _created_at_timestamp_in_utc, employee_profile_id, leave_request_id, leave_day, status)
			select  @currentLoggedInUserId, @creationDate, @creationTime, @currentTimestampInUtc, @employee_profile_id, @selectedRowId, @leave_date, 'submitted' 
		end

		set @leave_date =  DATEADD(DAY, 1, @leave_date)
end

			select  @currentLoggedInUserId, @creationDate, @creationTime, @currentTimestampInUtc, @employee_profile_id, @selectedRowId, @leave_date, 'submitted' 
		end

		set @leave_date =  DATEADD(DAY, 1, @leave_date)
end

afterInsertSql.sql:
Declare @e_id int
Declare empList Cursor
	For 
	select id from employee_profile

Open empList

Fetch Next From empList Into @e_id


While @@FETCH_STATUS=0
	Begin 

	 if (select status from employee_profile where id = @e_id) = 'active'
	 Begin
			insert into available_leaves(_creation_date,_creation_time, _creator,_created_at_timestamp_in_utc, employee_profile_id, leave_type_id, available_leaves)
			select GETDATE(),GETDATE(),@currentLoggedInUserId,@currentTimestampInUtc, @e_id, @selectedRowId, @no_of_leaves_in_an_year

	 End

		
		Fetch Next From empList Into @e_id
	End
	
	
Close empList
Deallocate empList

autoUpdateSql_After1.sql:
Declare @newTotalTransactionalSMSCredits int;

if(@type = 'transactional')
begin
	select @newTotalTransactionalSMSCredits =  ISNULL(total_transactional_sms_credits, 0) + @noOfCredits
	from _application_settings

	update _application_settings
	set total_transactional_sms_credits = @newTotalTransactionalSMSCredits,
	transactional_sms_credits_remaining = @newTotalTransactionalSMSCredits - transactional_sms_credits_used
end

config.value:
Declare @newTotalTransactionalSMSCredits int;

if(@type = 'transactional')
begin
	select @newTotalTransactionalSMSCredits =  ISNULL(total_transactional_sms_credits, 0) + @noOfCredits
	from _application_settings

	update _application_settings
	set total_transactional_sms_credits = @newTotalTransactionalSMSCredits,
	transactional_sms_credits_remaining = @newTotalTransactionalSMSCredits - transactional_sms_credits_used
end

Declare @newTotalPromotionalSMSCredits int;

if(@type = 'promotional')
begin
	select @newTotalPromotionalSMSCredits =  ISNULL(total_promotional_sms_credits, 0) + @noOfCredits
	from _application_settings

	update _application_settings
	set total_promotional_sms_credits = @newTotalPromotionalSMSCredits,
	promotional_sms_credits_remaining = @newTotalPromotionalSMSCredits - promotional_sms_credits_used
end

	from _application_settings

	update _application_settings
	set total_promotional_sms_credits = @newTotalPromotionalSMSCredits,
	promotional_sms_credits_remaining = @newTotalPromotionalSMSCredits - promotional_sms_credits_used

from _application_settings

afterInsertSql.sql:
Declare @lt_id int
Declare ltList Cursor
	For 
	select id from leave_types

Open ltList

Fetch Next From ltList Into @lt_id


While @@FETCH_STATUS=0
	Begin 
		declare @no_of_leaves_in_an_year decimal(12,4)

		set @no_of_leaves_in_an_year = (select no_of_leaves_in_an_year from leave_types where id = @lt_id)

			insert into available_leaves(_creation_date,_creation_time, _creator,_created_at_timestamp_in_utc, employee_profile_id, leave_type_id, available_leaves)
			select GETDATE(),GETDATE(),@currentLoggedInUserId,@currentTimestampInUtc, @selectedRowId, @lt_id, @no_of_leaves_in_an_year


		Fetch Next From ltList Into @lt_id
	End
	
	
Close ltList
Deallocate ltList

		set @no_of_leaves_in_an_year = (select no_of_leaves_in_an_year from leave_types where id = @lt_id)

			insert into available_leaves(_creation_date,_creation_time, _creator,_created_at_timestamp_in_utc, employee_profile_id, leave_type_id, available_leaves)

Close ltList

dataSource.sql:
declare @financial_year int
declare @date_from date
declare @date_to date

set @financial_year =@financialYear@
set @date_from = (select date_from from financial_year_profile where id = @financial_year)
set @date_to = (select date_to from financial_year_profile where id = @financial_year)

select 
	  ep.employee_code [Employee Code],ep.full_name [Full Name], convert(varchar,el.attendance_date, 106) [Attendance Date],
	  el.morning_attendance [Morning Attendance], el.afternoon_attendance [Afternoon Attendance] 
from 
	employee_ledger el
inner join
	employee_profile ep on ep.id = el.employee_profile_id
where 
	attendance_date between @date_from and @date_to

dataSource.sql:
declare @date_from date
declare @date_to date
declare @employee int

set @date_from = '@dateFrom@'
set @date_to = '@dateTo@'
set @employee = @employeeName@
select
	ep.employee_code [Employee Code], ep.full_name [Full Name], convert(varchar,el.attendance_date, 106) [Attendance Date], el.morning_attendance [Morning Attendance], el.afternoon_attendance [Afternoon Attendance]
from 
	employee_ledger el
inner join 
	employee_profile ep on ep.id = el.employee_profile_id
where 
	el.employee_profile_id = @employee
and
	el.attendance_date between @date_from and @date_to

dataSource.sql:
declare @leave_type int

set @leave_type = @leaveType@


'' select 
	ep.employee_code [Employee Code], ep.full_name [Employee Name], lt.leave_type [Leave Type], substring(cast((lt.no_of_leaves_in_an_year - al.available_leaves) as varchar), 1,3) [Leaves Taken], substring(cast(al.available_leaves as varchar), 1, 3) [Available Leaves]
from 
	available_leaves al
inner join 
	employee_profile ep on ep.id = al.employee_profile_id
inner join 
	leave_types lt on lt.id = al.leave_type_id
where
	(al.leave_type_id = @leave_type
or
	@leave_type = '')

config.value:
'' select 
	ep.employee_code [Employee Code], ep.full_name [Employee Name], lt.leave_type [Leave Type], substring(cast((lt.no_of_leaves_in_an_year - al.available_leaves) as varchar), 1,3) [Leaves Taken], substring(cast(al.available_leaves as varchar), 1, 3) [Available Leaves]
from 
	available_leaves al
inner join 
	employee_profile ep on ep.id = al.employee_profile_id
inner join 
	leave_types lt on lt.id = al.leave_type_id
where
	(al.leave_type_id = @leave_type
or
	@leave_type = '')
